titleStmt.title: SII 20.35: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 35. (B.K. No. 69 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Basavaṇṇa outside the village.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 977, Manmatha Pushya śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa Saṁkrānti. The Saṁkrānti occurred on Monday, 25th December, A.D. 1055, when the tithi was śu. 4 and not śu. 5.

The inscription records gift of lands to God Sōmēśvara, for offerings, oil-lamp, etc., by Barmma-gāvuṇḍa when Chālukya-Ka[li]-Gaṅga-Permānaḍi-Vikramādityadēva bearing the epithets Konguḷivarmma-Dharmma-mahārājādhirāja, Kōḷāḷapuravarēśvara and Nandagirinātha was governing the Gaṅgavāḍi-96000, Mahāmātya Nāraṇayya was perggaḍe of Banavāsi-12000, Mallarasa was nāḻgāvuṇḍa of Bāsavūra-140 and Barmmayya, son of Sōvagāvuṇḍa was the ūrggāvuṇḍa of Beṅgēri. The gift was entrusted to Pasupatidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttamire svasti samastakoṁguḷivarmmadharmamahārājādhirājaṁ kōḷāḷapuravarēśvaraṁ nandagirināthaṁ jayaduttaraṁgaṁ gaṁgacūḍāma
ṇi śrīmacāḷukyakali gaṁgapermmānaḍi vikramādityadēvarmmavaṁdale maryyāde gaṁgavāḍi toṁbhattaṟusāsiramumaṁ pa
ścimanamudraparyyaṁntaṁbaraṁ duṣṭanigraha visiṣṭaprativā�nadiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamire svasti samastarājya
bharanirūpi tamahāmātyapadavīvirājamānamānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhasaktitrayasampannarappa śrīmatperggaḍe nāraṇayya
pramukhakaraṇaṁ banavāsipannircchāsirakkaṁ perggeḍetanaṁ geyye bāsavuranūṟanālvattarkkaṁ mallarasaṁ nāḻgāmuṇḍugeyye .
beṁgērige sōvagāvuṇḍana magaṁ barmmayyanūrggāvuṇḍu geyye sakanṛpakālātītasaṁvatsara saṁtagaḷu 977 neya manma
tha saṁvatsarada puṣya sudda 5 Ādityavāramuttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti vyatīpātamuṁ kūḍi bandaṁdu sōmēśvaradēvargge nivēdya
kkaṁ soḍareṇnegaṁ śrīgandhakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭikakkammendu barmagāvuṇḍaṁ dharmmacittadoḷnegaḷdu . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhā
ṇajapasamādhisaṁpannarappa śrīmatu pasupatidēvara kālaṁ kaṭṭi dhārāpūrvvakadiṁ beṁgēriya keṟeya keḷage biṭṭa gaḻde mattarondu keleyū
ra baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuva biṭṭa berddele mattaleraḍu keṟeya keḷagaṇa tuṁbina modalaḍakeya tōṭada maraṁ nūṟu mattaṁ bhōgada sūḷeya
rgge sarvvabādhaparihāramāge biṭṭa mane panneraḍu . ka . sthi ranenipanēkavākyaṁ parahita dharmajña sōmagāvuṇḍana putra dhare baṇni
se parōkṣadiṁ nirutaṁ bhūmiyuṁ maneyumaṁ tōṭamumaṁ . biṭṭanivanadhikapuṇya siṣṭiyoḷaggaḷamenippa barmmane
gāvuṇḍaṁ puṭṭidane kulakke tilakaṁ neṭṭane sivabhaktanātana pogaḷadarāru .
Digital edition of SII 20.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
